name: memory-recall
purpose: Recall relevant memory across all three tiers (T1 immediate context, T2 focus briefs, T3 long-term archive + wiki) and return one ranked, deduped, provenance-tagged block

query.description: The recall query — a topic, phrase, or question to look up across all memory tiers

budget.description: Approximate token budget for the merged output (default: 2000). One token ~= 4 chars.

entries.description: Ranked, deduped memory entries. Each entry has provenance (T1/T2/T3a/T3b), provenance_all (all tiers that had this fact), text, and score.

tokens_used.description: Approximate token count of the merged entries

note: This skill is deterministic (no LLM dispatch). skill.sh shells out to /usr/local/lib/gawd/memory/memory_recall.sh. Gracefully returns empty entries[] when all stores are absent — never fails.
